title: FullBright for No rain, No snow
description: A FullBright for No rain, No snow. (Official)
body:
# FullBright
This is an official FullBright mod for No Rain, No Snow Classic Edition. It improves visibility during rain, thunderstorms, and rain **at night**.
# No rain, No snow Classic Edition
No Rain, No Snow Classic Edition is the standalone version of No Rain, No Snow.
- [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-rain,-no-snow)
# Dependency
- [No rain, No snow Classic Edition](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-rain,-no-snow/versions)
